recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.

recommendations.title: Talvar
recommendations.overview: A hardened cop deals with three conflicting perspectives involving a brutal double murder. The case is complicated as the prime suspects are the parents who supposedly killed their teenage daughter.

recommendations.title: Lesson Plan
recommendations.overview: After a teacher dies, his best friend — a former cop — takes a job at the school where he worked to confront the gang he thinks was responsible.

recommendations.title: Death of a Cyclist
recommendations.overview: A couple having an affair strike a bicyclist with their car and do not offer aid out of fear of their relationship being exposed.

recommendations.title: The Good Neighbor
recommendations.overview: Two high school filmmakers decide to create the illusion of a haunting on an unsuspecting neighbor.

recommendations.title: Big Nothing
recommendations.overview: A frustrated, unemployed teacher joins forces with a scammer and his girlfriend in a blackmailing scheme.

recommendations.title: Kill Boksoon
recommendations.overview: At work, she's a renowned assassin. At home, she's a single mom to a teenage daughter. Killing? That's easy. It's parenting that's the hard part.

recommendations.title: Lost Bullet 2
recommendations.overview: Having cleared his name, genius mechanic Lino has only one goal in mind: getting revenge on the corrupt cops who killed his brother and his mentor.

recommendations.title: Cleveland Abduction
recommendations.overview: A single mother becomes Ariel Castro's first kidnapping victim, and finds herself trapped in his home with two other women for 11 years.
